File Information
Collection: Asella Organic — Full E2E Test Suite v4
Collection Description
Complete E2E test suite matched to migrations 001–004. Tests: data persistence, inventory triggers, commission triggers, role-based access, concurrent updates, and validation. Run in order — variables chain between requests.
